title: ModernCmds
description: Backport of some modern Java Edition commands for Beta!
body:
A plugin that backports some commands from modern **Java** Edition!  
  
Can totally be useful for admins!  

### Commands
|Command|Permission|
|:------|---------:|
|achievement <give/list> <player> <achievement_id/*>|command.achievement|
|clear [player] [item:data]|command.clear|
|damage [player] [amount]|command.damage|
|fill <from> <to> <block_id> <mode> [mode_arg]|command.fill|
|setblock <x> <y> <z> <block>|command.setblock|
|summon <entity> <x> <y> <z>|command.summon|
|toggledownfall|command.toggledownfall|
|weather <clear/rain/thunder>|command.weather|
> More to come!
  
If you want a creative-mode like thing, you can try my other plugin [Instabuild](https://modrinth.com/plugin/instabuild).
